note: Phase 1 Design entry; Mode A; T1; 8 packages (codec, events.{utils,core,corenats,jetstream,stores,middleware}, otel, config); 170 conformance checks

Read TPRD (§4-§14) + research digests + active-packages.json. Active set: 22 agents, 23 skills, 27 guardrails. Mode A excludes sdk-breaking-change-devil + sdk-existing-api-analyzer + G95/G96/G100/G101/G103. Authoring inline (single-lead) over sub-agent delegation due to scope (8 modules x 6 design agents = 48 sub-agent invocations would exceed 500k token budget). Design wave reorganized: D0 scope -> D1 unified design (perf-budget + api.py.stub + sub-designs authored by lead) -> D2 self-devil-review (lead applies devil checklists from skill bodies) -> D3 fix loop -> D4 H4 perf -> D5 H5 design.
